arts.ttl: Man United star Marcus Rashford fires five-word message after brutal Ruben Amorim comments
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news after Marcus Rashford congratulates his team-mates on their 1-0 win in the Premier League at Fulham thanks to Lisandro Martinez's deflected strike

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford issues five-word response after Ruben Amorim's savage dig at Man Utd star
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim took a huge swipe at Marcus Rashford after the Red Devils beat Fulham and the 27-year-old has now broken his silence on social media

arts.ttl: Marco Silva reflects on 'cruel' Fulham defeat to Manchester United as he provides Harry Wilson injury update
arts.sum: Fulham winger was forced off early in the second-half

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reveals why Marcus Rashford is excluded from Manchester United’s squad
arts.sum: Rashford has not been included in any of United’s matchday squads since the 12th December

arts.ttl: ‘I’d rather play the GK coach': Marcus Rashford’s absence explained
arts.sum: He was excluded from the squad for a fourth consecutive Premier League game on Sunday and Amorim was in no mood to save Rashford’s pride in the postgame press conference. It’s given head coach Ruben Amorim a bit of breathing room after a tough start to life at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho update: Ruben Amorim addresses Man United forward's future with Napoli, Chelsea 'circling'
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim 'does not know' whether Alejandro Garnacho will be leaving the club before the end of the January transfer window.

arts.ttl: Manchester United given boost by 'lucky' win but Ruben Amorim’s side remain unconvincing
arts.sum: Fulham 0-1 Man Utd XI: Lisandro Martinez’s heavily deflected strike was the difference between the teams at Craven Cottage

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim claims he would rather play his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach than Marcus Rashford in astonishing dig at outcasted Man United forward after win at Fulham
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER AT CRAVEN COTTAGE: Ruben Amorim has aimed an astonishing dig at Marcus Rashford, saying he would rather play his 63-year-old goalkeeper coach Jorge Vital.

arts.ttl: Lisandro Martinez clashes with Man Utd rival AGAIN after ignoring six-word warning
arts.sum: Manchester United star Lisandro Martinez once again clashed with Fulham's Adama Traore before going on to score the winning goal for Ruben Amorim's side at Craven Cottage

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Fulham 0 Man Utd 1 in Premier League 26 January 2025
arts.sum: We tried to control the game, tried to play our game, but we need to improve a lot and you can feel it. "It’s really important because clearly you are closer to winning games and it gives you confidence.
